hook.headline: This IG DM either gets a date… or blocked

reply.text: What do you hit more often gym sessions or confused men

messages.text: I hit blocks more than both actually
Good thing I dont confuse easy or skip gym days
Oh you read minds now that is cute
Nah I read patterns and yours screams men stay losing
Funny because youre still here typing novels
im just doing cardio for my thumbs stay focused
Your thumbs working harder than your brain though
so its me or its me?
You say that like it is new
About you hitting confused men then reracking them
Please you would not last one set with me
Bet I outlast your playlist and your attitude
Strong words for someone scared of leg day energy
If I survive your replies I can survive squats with you
Brave assumption so what is your move then
Drinks after your next gym session you pick the night
